initiatives.name: SURJ Cincinnati
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Cincinnati. They coordinate community organizing, mobilizing, and education initiatives while building power through political education, direct action support, and creating spaces for accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Grove House Community
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective in Cincinnati fostering community care and solidarity through shared resources and collective organizing. They coordinate direct support, community gatherings, and resource sharing while building sustainable networks of mutual aid and community power.

initiatives.name: Trans Mentorship of Cincinnati
initiatives.description: The Transgender Mentorship is working to bring support and friendship to transgender people in the Greater Cincinnati, OH area.

initiatives.name: Transform Cincy
initiatives.description: An LGBTQ+ Cntr in Cincy! Also curated clothing for TGNC youth.

initiatives.name: Trans Wellness
initiatives.description: Heartland Trans Wellness Group is a Cincinnati, Ohio based project dedicated to creating accessible, affirming community resources for Midwestern trans, queer, and LGBTQPIA people.

initiatives.name: Cincy Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: Food sovereignty & nonviolent resistance to the increasing threat of war on our streets & around the globe

initiatives.name: Cincinnati Socialists
initiatives.description: An independent Marxist organization fighting for workers’ rights and the liberation of all oppressed people.

initiatives.name: Cincinnati Community Aid and Praxis
initiatives.description: A local communist organization aiming to empower & liberate the people of Cincinnati, Ohio.

initiatives.name: The Greater Cincinnati Homeless Coalition
initiatives.description: Fighting to eradicate homelessness through advocacy, organizing, & education. Advocates for safe & affordable housing for all.
